Builds a tool provider adapter inputs.

## Import

```ts
import { buildToolProviderAdapterInputs } from "@graphrefly/ts/orchestration";
```

## Signature

```ts
function buildToolProviderAdapterInputs(opts: {
	readonly requests: readonly AgentRequestIssued[];
	readonly routes?: readonly ExecutorRoute[];
	readonly catalogs?: readonly ToolProviderCatalog[];
	readonly resolutions: readonly ToolProviderPolicyResolution[];
}): readonly ToolProviderAdapterInput[]
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |

## Returns

The build tool provider adapter inputs result.
